MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-25-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY PRESIDENT ASSOCIATES, LP MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication

is DENIED. Plaintiff as moving party fails to provide admissible and undisputed evidence for the essential element of Plaintiff's performance in the breach of contract and breach of implied covenant causes of action. See CACI Instructions No. 303 and 325. There is also a triable issue of material fact for the essential element of harm/damages in all three causes of action as to whether the attorney fees in the TRO cases, Tom Bane case, and small claims/rent board cases are reasonable. See CACI Instructions No. 303, 325 and 2021. Plaintiff fails to shift its burden. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that tracks the Court's tentative ruling and is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: W. Trupek, Not reported (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-04-2022 Continued To Apr-25-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY PRESIDENT ASSOCIATES, LP'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is continued to April 25, 2022 on the Court's own motion.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
